seoTitle: Sunshine Acres vs Surat — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sunshine Acres and Surat. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sunshine Acres vs Surat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sunshine Acres and Surat.
heading: Sunshine Acres vs Surat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sunshine Acres, Queensland and Surat, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunshine Acres has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Surat (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sunshine Acres or Surat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sunshine Acres has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Surat scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sunshine Acres scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Surat scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sunshine Acres or Surat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunshine Acres has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
